# tcg-sandbox_game_set (Resource)

Manages a game set in TCG Sandbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attributes` (Map of String) A map of attribute names to their types ('string', 'number', or 'boolean').
- `game_id` (String) The unique identifier of the parent game.
- `id` (String) The user-chosen set ID/slug. This becomes the immutable identifier for the set.
- `name` (String) The display name of the set.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the set.
